change_reason: Lourenço Marques full-footprint repair: preserved arable hectares but replaced Maputo-Gaza/lower-Limpopo scope wording.

validation_note: Lourenço Marques arable capacity is bound to the corrected full split-state footprint; row-local evidence may localize to Maputo Bay, lower Limpopo, Inhambane coast, southern Sofala, or southern Manica, but none of those belts defines the whole state.
change_reason: Lourenço Marques full-footprint repair: preserved arable hectares but replaced Maputo-Gaza/lower-Limpopo scope wording.

year_selection_reason: Arable land capacity is audited as broad plausible 1936 commercial potential rather than GDP-selected realized output.
capacity_note: Full Lourenço Marques footprint checked first: Maputo Province, Maputo City, Inhambane, Gaza, Sofala south/inclusive of the Pungwe, and Manica south/inclusive of the Pungwe. Existing hectares remain a bounded commercial-arable model for in-footprint coastal, lower-Limpopo, southern Sofala wetland/river, and southern Manica mixed-farming belts; this is not Maputo-Gaza shorthand and not whole-Mozambique potential.

citation_1_locator: Mozambique section: southern Mozambique was re-read as the full Maputo/Gaza/Inhambane plus south-of-Pungwe Sofala/Manica footprint, with lowland maize, millet/sorghum, rice, bananas, sugar, cotton, and bounded highland tobacco support.
